LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_Empty: No minds have been recorded by the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_StatusWaiting: Shell ready; waiting for a fingerspike
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_StatusImplanting: Fingerspike is implanting the stored mind
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ReconstructTooltip: Select a cell and grow a new body from this memory. Costs {0} brain hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_DeleteConfirm: Erase the stored memory of {0}? A living accepted pawn will not be recorded again until it loses and regains flesh-colony acceptance.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_DeleteActive: This memory cannot be erased while its shell is growing.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ReconstructionStarted: The colony brain has begun growing a new body for {0}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ReconstructionComplete: {0} has been restored from the colony's memory.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ArchiveUnavailable: The flesh-colony memory archive is unavailable.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_InvalidBrain: The selected colony brain cannot begin reconstruction.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_NotDead: This mind still has a living source.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_AlreadyGrowing: A body is already being grown from this memory.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_BrainBusy: This colony brain is already growing another body.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_NoGrowthCell: There is no suitable cell near the colony brain for a new shell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_InvalidGrowthCell: Select an empty standable cell for the new shell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_CreateShellFailed: The colony brain failed to form a viable shell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_InvalidOperation: The reconstruction operation is no longer valid.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ResurrectionFailed: The fingerspike failed to awaken the grown shell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMemory_ReconstructUnavailable: This memory cannot currently be reconstructed.
